package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for repeated_json_marshaling: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: encoding/json.Marshal or MarshalIndent inside loops — repeated allocation and serialization hot spots.
type CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingModel
}

type CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingService struct {
    repo *CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRepeatedJsonMarshaling(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepeatedJsonMarshalingDTO) error {
    focus := "repeated_json_marshaling"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { json.Marshal(item) }
    repeated_json_marshaling_positive := map[string]int{"repeated": 1, "json": 2, "marshaling": 3}
    repeated_json_marshaling_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repeated_positive_0 := repeated_json_marshaling_positive["repeated"] + len(input)
    _ = repeated_positive_0
    json_positive_1 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_positive_1
    marshaling_positive_2 := repeated_json_marshaling_positive["marshaling"] + len(input)
    _ = marshaling_positive_2
    return nil
}
